mapper.select: /* saltSttcMapper.getChnlSaleSttcList */ SELECT DECODE( X.MDL_YN, NULL, '', DECODE(X.CHNL_TP, NULL, '', DECODE(X.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', 'PP', '선불', ''))) AS pppo , DECODE( X.CHNL_TP, NULL, '', DECODE(X.PPPO, 'PO', DECODE(X.MDL_YN, 'Y', '단말결합', 'N', '유심단독'), 'PP', DECODE(X.MDL_YN, 'Y', '일반유심', 'N', '단기유심'), '')) AS prodNm , DECODE( X.PPPO, 'PO', DECODE(X.CHNL_TP, NULL, DECODE(X.MDL_YN, NULL, '후불합계', '소계') , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0055', X.CHNL_TP)), 'PP', DECODE(X.MDL_YN, NULL, '선불합계', ''), '합계') AS chnlTpNm , X.KEEP_CNT AS keepCnt , X.MM_OPEN_CNT AS mmOpenCnt , X.MM_CAN_CNT AS mmCanCnt , X.MM_OPEN_CNT - X.MM_CAN_CNT AS mmNewCnt , X.MM_TMNT_CNT AS mmTmntCnt , X.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT AS mmTmntRclCnt , X.MM_OPEN_CNT - X.MM_CAN_CNT - X.MM_TMNT_CNT + X.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT AS mmNetCnt , X.OPEN_CNT AS openCnt , X.CAN_CNT AS canCnt , X.OPEN_CNT - X.CAN_CNT AS newCnt , X.TMNT_CNT AS tmntCnt , X.TMNT_RCL_CNT AS tmntRclCnt , X.OPEN_CNT - X.CAN_CNT - X.TMNT_CNT + X.TMNT_RCL_CNT AS netCnt FROM ( SELECT A.PPPO , A.MDL_YN , A.CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS KEEP_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_CAN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS OPEN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS CAN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT , CASE WHEN A.PPPO = 'PO' THEN CASE WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'Y' THEN DECODE(A.CHNL_TP, NULL, 2, 1) WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'N' THEN DECODE(A.CHNL_TP, NULL, 4, 3) ELSE 5 END WHEN A.PPPO = 'PP' THEN CASE WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'Y' THEN 6 WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'N' THEN 7 ELSE 8 END ELSE 9 END AS SORT FROM ( SELECT AA.PPPO , AA.MDL_YN , AA.CHNL_TP , AA.KEEP_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) AS MM_CAN_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT , NVL(CC.OPEN_CNT, 0) AS OPEN_CNT , NVL(CC.CAN_CNT, 0) AS CAN_CNT , NVL(CC.TMNT_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_CNT , NVL(CC.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.PPPO , A.MDL_YN , SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'B' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) ) AA , ( SELECT A.MDL_YN , SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_CAN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.MDL_YN , A.CHNL_TP , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT , A.TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT >= SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6)||'01' AND A.WORK_DT < #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = '2400' UNION ALL SELECT A.MDL_YN , A.CHNL_TP , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT , A.TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} ) A GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) ) BB , ( SELECT A.MDL_YN , SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS OPEN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS CAN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) ) CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.MDL_YN = BB.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = BB.CHNL_TP(+) AND AA.MDL_YN = CC.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = CC.CHNL_TP(+) UNION ALL SELECT AA.PPPO , AA.MDL_YN , AA.CHNL_TP , NVL(AA.KEEP_CNT, 0) AS KEEP_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) AS MM_CAN_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_CNT , NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT , NVL(CC.OPEN_CNT, 0) AS OPEN_CNT , NVL(CC.CAN_CNT, 0) AS CAN_CNT , NVL(CC.TMNT_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_CNT , NVL(CC.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.PPPO , A.MDL_YN , SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1 , 3) AS CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'B' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) ) AA , ( SELECT A.MDL_YN , SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1 , 3) AS CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_CAN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.MDL_YN , A.CHNL_TP , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT , A.TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT >= SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6)||'01' AND A.WORK_DT < #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = '2400' UNION ALL SELECT A.MDL_YN , A.CHNL_TP , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT , A.TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} ) A GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) ) BB , ( SELECT A.MDL_YN , SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP , SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS OPEN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS CAN_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT , SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) ) CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.MDL_YN = BB.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = BB.CHNL_TP(+) AND AA.MDL_YN = CC.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = CC.CHNL_TP(+) ) A GROUP BY ROLLUP(A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, A.CHNL_TP) ) X WHERE 1 = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE PPPO = 'PP' AND MDL_YN IS NOT NULL AND CHNL_TP IS NULL ) ORDER BY X.SORT, X.CHNL_TP

/* saltSttcMapper.getFstRateSaleSttcList */ SELECT DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, '', DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', A.PAY_CL_CD)) AS payClCd, DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, DECODE(A.PAY_CL_CD, 'PO', '후불합계', 'PP', '선불합계', '합계'), '소계'), A.DATA_TYPE) AS dataType, A.RATE_CD AS rateCd, DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD)) AS rateNm, DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, '', DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0032', A.PAY_CL_CD))) AS pppo, SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS keepCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS mmOpenCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS mmCanCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS mmNewCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS mmTmntCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS mmNetCnt, SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS openCnt, SUM(NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS canCnt, SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS newCnt, SUM(NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS tmntCnt, SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS netCnt FROM (SELECT A.RATE_CD, B.RATE_NM, B.DATA_TYPE, B.PAY_CL_CD, A.KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A, MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND A.WORK_CD = 'B' AND A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.APPL_END_DT = (SELECT MAX(APPL_END_DT) FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD)) A, (SELECT A.RATE_CD, SUM(A.OPEN_CNT) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, SUM(A.CAN_CNT) AS MM_CAN_CNT, SUM(A.TMNT_CNT) AS MM_TMNT_CNT FROM (SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.OPEN_CNT, A.CAN_CNT, A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.WORK_DT >= SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6) || '01' AND A.WORK_DT < #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = '2400' UNION ALL SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.OPEN_CNT, A.CAN_CNT, A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm}) A GROUP BY A.RATE_CD) B, (SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.OPEN_CNT, A.CAN_CNT, A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND A.WORK_CD = 'A') C WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD(+) GROUP BY ROLLUP(A.PAY_CL_CD, A.DATA_TYPE, A.RATE_CD)

/* saltSttcMapper.getLstRateSaleSttcList */ SELECT DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, '', DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', A.PAY_CL_CD)) AS payClCd, DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, DECODE(A.PAY_CL_CD, 'PO', '후불합계', 'PP', '선불합계', '합계'), '소계'), A.DATA_TYPE) AS dataType, A.RATE_CD AS rateCd, DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD)) AS rateNm, DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, '', DECODE(A.RATE_CD, NULL, '', FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0032', A.PAY_CL_CD))) AS pppo, SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS keepCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS mmOpenCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS mmCanCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS mmNewCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS mmTmntCnt, SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS mmNetCnt, SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS openCnt, SUM(NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS canCnt, SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS newCnt, SUM(NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS tmntCnt, SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS netCnt FROM (SELECT A.RATE_CD, B.RATE_NM, B.DATA_TYPE, B.PAY_CL_CD, A.KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A, MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND A.WORK_CD = 'D' AND A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.APPL_END_DT = (SELECT MAX(APPL_END_DT) FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD)) A, (SELECT A.RATE_CD, SUM(A.OPEN_CNT) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, SUM(A.CAN_CNT) AS MM_CAN_CNT, SUM(A.TMNT_CNT) AS MM_TMNT_CNT FROM (SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.OPEN_CNT, A.CAN_CNT, A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'C' AND A.WORK_DT >= SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6) || '01' AND A.WORK_DT < #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = '2400' UNION ALL SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.OPEN_CNT, A.CAN_CNT, A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'C' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm}) A GROUP BY A.RATE_CD) B, (SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.OPEN_CNT, A.CAN_CNT, A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND A.WORK_CD = 'C') C WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD(+) GROUP BY ROLLUP(A.PAY_CL_CD, A.DATA_TYPE, A.RATE_CD)

/* saltSttcMapper.getAgncySaleSttcList */ SELECT A.agncyCd , A.agncyNm , DECODE(A.buyType, '소계' , '', '합계' , '', A.buyType) as buyType, A.dataType , A.keepCnt , A.mmOpenCnt , A.mmCanCnt , A.mmNewCnt , A.mmTmntCnt , A.mmNetCnt , A.openCnt , A.canCnt , A.newCnt , A.tmntCnt , A.netCnt FROM (SELECT A.AGNCY_CD AS agncyCd , DECODE(A.BUY_TYPE, NULL, DECODE(A.AGNCY_CD, NULL, ''), FN_GET_ORGNM(A.AGNCY_CD)) AS agncyNm , DECODE(A.BUY_TYPE, NULL, DECODE(A.AGNCY_CD, NULL, '합계', '소계'), DECODE(A.BUY_TYPE, 'MM', '단말결합', 'UU', '유심단독', A.BUY_TYPE)) AS buyType , DECODE(A.DATA_TYPE, NULL, DECODE(A.AGNCY_CD, NULL, '합계', '소계'), A.DATA_TYPE) AS dataType , SUM(A.KEEP_CNT) AS keepCnt , SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS mmOpenCnt , SUM(NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS mmCanCnt , SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS mmNewCnt , SUM(NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS mmTmntCnt , SUM(NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS mmNetCnt , SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS openCnt , SUM(NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS canCnt , SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS newCnt , SUM(NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS tmntCnt , SUM(NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.CAN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS netCnt FROM (SELECT AGNCY_CD , BUY_TYPE , DATA_TYPE , KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_AGNCY_SALE_RSLT_STTC WHERE WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND WORK_CD = 'B' ) A , (SELECT AGNCY_CD , BUY_TYPE , DATA_TYPE , SUM(OPEN_CNT) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , SUM(CAN_CNT) AS MM_CAN_CNT , SUM(TMNT_CNT) AS MM_TMNT_CNT FROM (SELECT A.AGNCY_CD , A.BUY_TYPE , A.DATA_TYPE , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_AGNCY_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.WORK_DT >= SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6)||'01' AND A.WORK_DT <#{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = '2400' UNION ALL SELECT A.AGNCY_CD , A.BUY_TYPE , A.DATA_TYPE , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_AGNCY_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} ) A GROUP BY AGNCY_CD, BUY_TYPE, DATA_TYPE ) B , (SELECT AGNCY_CD , BUY_TYPE , DATA_TYPE , SUM(OPEN_CNT) AS OPEN_CNT , SUM(CAN_CNT) AS CAN_CNT , SUM(TMNT_CNT) AS TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_AGNCY_SALE_RSLT_STTC WHERE WORK_DT =#{stdrDt} AND WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND WORK_CD = 'A' GROUP BY AGNCY_CD, BUY_TYPE, DATA_TYPE ) C WHERE A.AGNCY_CD = B.AGNCY_CD(+) AND A.BUY_TYPE = B.BUY_TYPE(+) AND A.DATA_TYPE = B.DATA_TYPE(+) AND A.AGNCY_CD = C.AGNCY_CD(+) AND A.BUY_TYPE = C.BUY_TYPE(+) AND A.DATA_TYPE = C.DATA_TYPE(+) GROUP BY ROLLUP(A.AGNCY_CD, A.BUY_TYPE, A.DATA_TYPE)) A

/* saltSttcMapper.getAddProdSttcList */
SELECT A.RATE_CD AS rateCd , D.RATE_NM AS rateNm , D.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt , A.KEEP_CNT AS keepCnt , NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) AS mmOpenCnt , NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0) AS mmTmntCnt , NVL(B.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(B.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0) AS mmNetCnt , NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) AS openCnt , NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0) AS tmntCnt , NVL(C.OPEN_CNT, 0) - NVL(C.TMNT_CNT, 0) AS netCnt FROM ( SELECT A.RATE_CD , A.KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND A.WORK_CD = 'F' ) A , ( SELECT A.RATE_CD , SUM(A.OPEN_CNT) AS MM_OPEN_CNT , SUM(A.TMNT_CNT) AS MM_TMNT_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.RATE_CD , A.OPEN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'E' AND A.WORK_DT >= SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6)||'01' AND A.WORK_DT < #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = '2400' UNION ALL SELECT A.RATE_CD , A.OPEN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'E' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} ) A GROUP BY A.RATE_CD ) B , ( SELECT A.RATE_CD , A.OPEN_CNT , A.CAN_CNT , A.TMNT_CNT FROM MSP_RATE_SALE_RSLT_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} AND A.WORK_CD = 'E' ) C , MSP_RATE_MST D WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD(+) AND A.RATE_CD = D.RATE_CD ORDER BY A.RATE_CD

/* saltSttcMapper.getChnlDataSttcList */ SELECT CASE WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.CHNL_TP IS NOT NULL AND X.MDL_YN IS NOT NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN '후불' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.MDL_YN IS NULL AND X.CHNL_TP IS NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '후불합계' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PP' AND X.CHNL_TP IS NOT NULL AND X.MDL_YN IS NOT NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN '선불' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PP' AND X.MDL_YN IS NULL AND X.CHNL_TP IS NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '선불합계' WHEN X.PPPO IS NULL AND X.MDL_YN IS NULL AND X.CHNL_TP IS NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '선후불합계' ELSE '' END AS pppo, CASE WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.MDL_YN = 'Y' AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN '단말결합' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.MDL_YN = 'Y' AND X.CHNL_TP IS NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '단말결합합계' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.MDL_YN = 'N' AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN '유심단독' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.MDL_YN = 'N' AND X.CHNL_TP IS NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '유심단독합계' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PP' AND X.MDL_YN = 'Y' AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN '일반유심' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PP' AND X.MDL_YN = 'Y' AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '일반유심합계' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PP' AND X.MDL_YN = 'N' AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN '단기유심' WHEN X.PPPO = 'PP' AND X.MDL_YN = 'N' AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '단기유심합계' ELSE '' END AS prodNm, CASE WHEN X.CHNL_TP IS NOT NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0055', X.CHNL_TP) ELSE '' END AS chnlTpNm, CASE WHEN X.PPPO = 'PO' AND X.MDL_YN IS NOT NULL AND X.CHNL_TP IS NOT NULL AND X.DATA_TYPE IS NULL THEN '소계' ELSE X.DATA_TYPE END AS dataType, X.KEEP_CNT AS keepCnt, X.MM_OPEN_CNT AS mmOpenCnt, X.MM_CAN_CNT AS mmCanCnt, X.MM_OPEN_CNT - X.MM_CAN_CNT AS mmNewCnt, X.MM_TMNT_CNT AS mmTmntCnt, X.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT AS mmTmntRclCnt, X.MM_OPEN_CNT - X.MM_CAN_CNT - X.MM_TMNT_CNT + X.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT AS mmNetCnt, X.OPEN_CNT AS openCnt, X.CAN_CNT AS canCnt, X.OPEN_CNT - X.CAN_CNT AS newCnt, X.TMNT_CNT AS tmntCnt, X.TMNT_RCL_CNT AS tmntRclCnt, X.OPEN_CNT - X.CAN_CNT - X.TMNT_CNT + X.TMNT_RCL_CNT AS netCnt FROM (SELECT A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, A.CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE, SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS KEEP_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.MM_CAN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_CAN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS OPEN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS CAN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT, CASE WHEN A.PPPO = 'PO' THEN CASE WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'Y' THEN DECODE(A.CHNL_TP, NULL, 2, 1) WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'N' THEN DECODE(A.CHNL_TP, NULL, 4, 3) ELSE 5 END WHEN A.PPPO = 'PP' THEN CASE WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'Y' THEN 6 WHEN A.MDL_YN = 'N' THEN 7 ELSE 8 END ELSE 9 END AS SORT FROM (SELECT AA.PPPO, AA.MDL_YN, AA.CHNL_TP, AA.DATA_TYPE, AA.KEEP_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) AS MM_CAN_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, NVL(CC.OPEN_CNT, 0) AS OPEN_CNT, NVL(CC.CAN_CNT, 0) AS CAN_CNT, NVL(CC.TMNT_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_CNT, NVL(CC.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM (SELECT A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE, SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'B' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3), A.DATA_TYPE) AA, (SELECT A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE, SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_CAN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6) || '01' AND #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3), A.DATA_TYPE) BB, (SELECT A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE, SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS OPEN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS CAN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3), A.DATA_TYPE) CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.MDL_YN = BB.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = BB.CHNL_TP(+) AND AA.DATA_TYPE = BB.DATA_TYPE(+) AND AA.MDL_YN = CC.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = CC.CHNL_TP(+) AND AA.DATA_TYPE = CC.DATA_TYPE(+) UNION ALL SELECT AA.PPPO, AA.MDL_YN, AA.CHNL_TP, AA.DATA_TYPE, NVL(AA.KEEP_CNT, 0) AS KEEP_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_OPEN_CNT, 0) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_CAN_CNT, 0) AS MM_CAN_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_CNT, NVL(BB.MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT, NVL(CC.OPEN_CNT, 0) AS OPEN_CNT, NVL(CC.CAN_CNT, 0) AS CAN_CNT, NVL(CC.TMNT_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_CNT, NVL(CC.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM (SELECT A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, A.DATA_TYPE, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP, SUM(NVL(A.KEEP_CNT, 0)) AS KEEP_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'B' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3), A.DATA_TYPE) AA, (SELECT A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE, SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_OPEN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS MM_CAN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS MM_TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{stdrDt}, 1, 6) || '01' AND #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3), A.DATA_TYPE) BB, (SELECT A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3) AS CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE, SUM(NVL(A.OPEN_CNT, 0)) AS OPEN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.CAN_CNT, 0)) AS CAN_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT, SUM(NVL(A.TMNT_RCL_CNT, 0)) AS TMNT_RCL_CNT FROM MSP_CHNL_SALE_STTC A WHERE A.WORK_CD = 'A' AND A.PPPO = 'PP' AND A.WORK_DT = #{stdrDt} AND A.WORK_TM = #{stdrTm} GROUP BY A.MDL_YN, SUBSTR(A.CHNL_TP, 1, 3), A.DATA_TYPE) CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.MDL_YN = BB.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = BB.CHNL_TP(+) AND AA.DATA_TYPE = BB.DATA_TYPE(+) AND AA.MDL_YN = CC.MDL_YN(+) AND AA.CHNL_TP = CC.CHNL_TP(+) AND AA.DATA_TYPE = CC.DATA_TYPE(+)) A GROUP BY ROLLUP(A.PPPO, A.MDL_YN, A.CHNL_TP, A.DATA_TYPE)) X WHERE 1 = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE PPPO = 'PP' AND MDL_YN IS NOT NULL AND CHNL_TP IS NULL) ORDER BY X.SORT, X.CHNL_TP, X.DATA_TYPE
